commit_message:
Revert pull request #28 and fix minor bugs in psi_common_math_pkg.from_str() Revert pull request #28 and fix minor bugs in psi_common_math_pkg.from_str() Pull request #28 broke synthesis in Xilinx Vivado 2020.1 because Vivado doesn't fully support VHDL-93 yet. (Specifically, `std.textio.line` is an `access` type, which is not supported by Vivado).

Therefore, I reverted that change (a2c6456), then implemented minor bug fixes for handling explicit "+" signs in `from_str()` (be3e56d).

I used

Therefore, I reverted that change (a2c6456), then implemented minor bug fixes for handling explicit "+" signs in `from_str()` (be3e56d).
